scope: Battle Command map-selection inspector transfer actions for selected brigade StandingOrder
steps: Opened the local app and entered the campaign from the strategic map.
Clicked `幕舎で準備する`, waited about 3 seconds, then clicked `出撃配置へ`.
Clicked `選抜部隊で戦闘開始` and verified Battle Command loaded with 7 player map units and 1 structure.
Clicked `施設近接へ基準` from the map-selection inspector and verified the selected brigade command summary changed to a facility-near anchor with pending command transmission.
Clicked `選択旅団を戦線へ` and verified the selected brigade received the selected frontline anchor/fallback values.
Ran battle at `3倍` long enough to spawn enemies, stopped the battle, clicked a visible enemy map token, and verified `敵前縁布陣予測` plus `敵前縁へ布陣` appeared.
Clicked `敵前縁へ布陣` and verified the selected brigade command summary changed to enemy-front anchor `X45 Y48`, fallback `X29 Y48`, and focus target `アンデッド群集`.

verified.facilityNearAnchorCommand: selected command summary showed `基準 X35 Y34` and pending `伝令 3秒 / 基準位置`
verified.frontlineTransferCommand: selected command compass showed `戦線 森林左翼線`, `基準 X34 Y24`, and `後退 X16 Y28`
verified.enemyScreenCommand: selected command summary showed `基準 X45 Y48`, `後退 X29 Y48`, and focus target `アンデッド群集`

notes: The new actions reuse existing StandingOrder/order functions and command-transmission behavior.
Mobile/cellphone QA remains outside the current target.
